title: Decoration Delight: continue
description: It brought more practical decorations to Minecraft.
body:
Decoration Delight: continue

Add more decorative fun to your kitchen and home! This mod continues the classic style, with new/optimized counters, tiles, mosaics, stools, and other blocks. Supports rotatable placement, multi-color customization, wood variant compatibility, and more.

Update highlights:
- Textures fine-tuned and adjusted (brightness, noise optimization)
- Bug fixes and compatibility with the latest Minecraft versions
- Expanded color options and interactions
- Better integration with the Farmer's Delight ecosystem
- Improved performance and loading times

All features are independently developed and refined. If the original author returns with official updates, this project will respectfully step aside and cease maintenance.

Feel free to report bugs or suggest new decorations!
